authors.author: Mark Hayes
Mark Hayes
Dank sei dir, Gott, du machst uns reich

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Give thanks with a grateful heart Give thanks to the Holy One Give thanks because he's given Jesus Christ His Son

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now let the weak say I am Strong Let the poor say I am rich Because of what the Lord has done for us

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And now let the sick say I am whole Let the bound say I am free Because of what the Lord has done for us Give thanks
